output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?races WHERE {
  wd:Q426350 wdt:P4182 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P192 ?races .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?time .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) IN(2002 , 2003))
}
ORDER BY ?races
LIMIT 2
output.formatted:
17

```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?races WHERE {
  wd:Q426350 wdt:P4182 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P192 ?races .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?time .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) IN(2002 , 2003))
}
ORDER BY ?races
LIMIT 2
```

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?races
WHERE {
  wd:Q426350 wdt:P4182 ?season.
  ?season wdt:P192 ?races.
  ?season wdt:P585 ?time.
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) IN (2002, 2003))
}
ORDER BY ?races
LIMIT 2
